category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Crystal as a fast, statically typed, compiled language with Ruby-like syntax.
source_facts.homepage is the official Crystal language website.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage and the official language reference use the Crystal project name.
docs_sources: Official Crystal website provides the language reference and API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/crystal-lang/crystal; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes compiled static typing and Ruby-like syntax; source_facts.executables includes crystal and shards.
